case_title: RYAN HOWARD VS. HAUL BIKES/DAILY DIRECT LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-07-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RYAN HOWARD IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT HAUL BIKES/DAILY DIRECT LLC IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DEEMS PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON MAR-01-2023 IS INVALID. THE CORRECT AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT WAS NOT SERVED PURSUANT TO THE SERVICE INFORMATION LISTED WITH THE CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE. PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO RE-SERVE CLAIM TO THE CORRECT AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
